sections.paragraph:
Original: מרום

Transliteration: mêrôm

Phonetic: may-rome'

BDB Definition:

Merom = "high place"
  1. the lake in northern Canaan at which Joshua routed the northern confederacy headed by Jabin
    1. site uncertain; probably the lake formed by the Jordan river about 10 miles (16 kilometers) north of the Sea of Galilee

Origin: formed like H4791

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
